templates.title_prediction: Based on the opening line '{opening}...', the poem appears to explore themes related to this initial imagery.
templates.no_title: No title or opening line available for prediction.
templates.paraphrase_summary: This {line_count}-line poem describes a sequence of images and ideas, moving from {first} to {last}.

attitude.positive: Positive/Optimistic - The speaker expresses hope, joy, or appreciation
attitude.negative: Negative/Pessimistic - The speaker expresses sorrow, anger, or despair
attitude.neutral: Neutral/Contemplative - The speaker maintains a balanced or reflective tone

templates.title_revisited: After analyzing the complete poem, the opening '{opening}...' takes on deeper meaning in the context of the work's overall themes.
templates.theme_default: The poem explores universal human experience through its imagery and tone.
templates.theme_keywords: The poem explores themes centered on {keywords}, developed through imagery and figurative language.

touchstone.author: gutenberg_corpus
touchstone.overall_strong: The work demonstrates qualities comparable to canonical masters, showing high seriousness and artistic merit.
touchstone.overall_moderate: The work shows promise with some qualities approaching canonical standards, though further development is needed.
touchstone.overall_minimal: The work shows individual voice but lacks the universal qualities found in touchstone passages from established masters.
